scripts.build:hosting: npm run version:sync && npm run icons:generate && npm run test && npm run check:social && npm run build && npm run build:game && npm run build:money && npm run build:table && npm run build:settlement && npm run build:session-startup && node scripts/prepare-hosting.js
scripts.build:test-version: BUILD_CHANNEL=dev node scripts/bump-version.js && BUILD_CHANNEL=dev npm run build:hosting
scripts.check:social: node --check docs/app.js && node --check docs/auth.js && node --check docs/firestore.js && node --check docs/money-persistence.js && node --check docs/robot-draw-authority.js && node --check docs/bot-orchestrator.js && node --check docs/bot-orchestration-runtime.js && node --check docs/session-orchestrator.js && node --check docs/session-lifecycle-ui.js && node --check docs/room-detail-view.js && node --check docs/table-view-model.js && node --check docs/table-feedback.js && node --check docs/table-intents.js && node --check docs/local-hand-commit.js && node --check docs/session-startup.js && node --check docs/enrollment-roster.js && node --check docs/invite-code.js && node --check docs/game-functions.js && node --check docs/game-engine.js && node --check docs/bourre-rules.js && node --check docs/bourre-settlement-flow.js && node --check docs/settlement-copy.js && node --check docs/house-rules.js && node --check docs/rules-content.js && node --check docs/rules-view.js && node --check docs/theme.js && node --check docs/feedback-prefs.js && node --check docs/play-now.js && node --check docs/version-update.js
scripts.build:functions: npm run build:game && npm run build:money && npm run build:session-startup && node scripts/sync-functions-engine.mjs && npm install --prefix functions --omit=dev
scripts.preview:hosting: npm run build:hosting && npx serve dist -l 5000
scripts.deploy: node scripts/ensure-firebase-config.js && node scripts/check-deploy-version.mjs && npm run build:hosting && npm run build:functions && npx firebase deploy --only hosting,firestore:rules,functions --project national-bourre-league
scripts.deploy:patch: BUILD_CHANNEL=production node scripts/bump-version.js && BUILD_CHANNEL=production npm run deploy
scripts.deploy:hosting: node scripts/ensure-firebase-config.js && node scripts/check-deploy-version.mjs && npm run build:hosting && npx firebase deploy --only hosting --project national-bourre-league
scripts.deploy:hosting:patch: BUILD_CHANNEL=production node scripts/bump-version.js && BUILD_CHANNEL=production npm run deploy:hosting
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run build:functions && npx firebase deploy --only functions,firestore:rules
scripts.test:game: tsx --test src/game/handState.test.ts src/game/deal.test.ts src/game/draw.test.ts src/game/drawPile.test.ts src/game/eightSeatDraw.test.ts src/game/legal.test.ts src/game/playContext.test.ts src/game/trick.test.ts src/game/play.test.ts src/game/bots.test.ts src/game/enrollment.test.ts src/game/fullHand.test.ts src/game/playerMatrix.test.ts src/game/playerOrder.test.ts src/game/decision.test.ts src/game/pagatRulesCompliance.test.ts src/game/money/money.test.ts src/game/money/bankrollRegression.test.ts src/game/money/bankrollProgression.test.ts src/game/money/winnerSettlementSymmetry.test.ts src/game/money/canonicalMoney.test.ts src/game/money/settlementScenarios.test.ts src/game/money/stakeReconciliation.test.ts
scripts.test:table: tsx --test src/table/logic.test.ts src/table/localAction.test.ts src/table/handUi.test.ts src/table/inactivityHelper.test.ts src/table/settlementCopy.test.ts src/table/trickTiming.test.ts src/table/turnCountdown.test.ts src/table/trickPresentationMachine.test.ts src/table/trickPlayFly.test.ts src/table/handPresentationMachine.test.ts src/table/heroHandDisplay.test.ts src/table/heroHandPlayPreselect.test.ts src/table/bestPlayPrefs.test.ts src/table/trumpHolderPresentation.test.ts src/table/tableMicrointeractions.test.ts src/table/stageFit.test.ts src/table/layout/mobileSeatMap.test.ts src/table/layout/sevenPlayerMobileSeatMap.test.ts src/table/layout/eightPlayerMobileSeatMap.test.ts src/table/layout/seatLayout.test.ts src/table/layout/seatOrder.test.ts src/table/feedback/feedback.test.ts src/table/yourTurnAttention.test.ts src/table/seatMetadata.test.ts src/table/actionErrorCopy.test.ts src/components/cardGesture.test.ts src/components/handLayout.test.ts src/table/animations/flip.test.ts src/table/trickAnimationBridge.test.ts src/table/playStartPresentationGate.test.ts src/table/discardPileModel.test.ts src/table/wonTrickPileModel.test.ts src/table/animations/wonTrickPileMotion.test.ts src/table/animations/dealPresentationMotion.test.ts src/table/profileRender.test.ts src/table/tableSeatSlotEqual.test.ts src/table/TrickAnimationBusySync.test.ts
scripts.test:session: tsx --test src/session/logic.test.ts src/session/dealer.test.ts src/session/liveHand.test.ts src/session/handLifecycle.test.ts src/session/handPhaseMachine.test.ts src/session/handInvariants.test.ts src/session/presetNames.test.ts src/session/tableStartup.test.ts src/session/tableHandChoice.test.ts src/session/handoffRecovery.test.ts src/session/transitionLock.test.ts
scripts.test:rules: node --test scripts/bourre-rules.test.mjs scripts/bourre-settlement-integration.test.mjs scripts/money-engine-integration.test.mjs scripts/pagat-rules-compliance.test.mjs scripts/robot-draw-authority.test.mjs scripts/bot-orchestrator.test.mjs scripts/session-orchestrator.test.mjs scripts/table-ui-layer.test.mjs scripts/table-action-feedback.test.mjs scripts/hand-invariants.test.mjs scripts/transition-guards.test.mjs scripts/risk-stakes.test.mjs scripts/room-ante-state.test.mjs scripts/remove-session-player.test.mjs scripts/invite-code.test.mjs scripts/firestore-settlement-rules.test.mjs scripts/local-hand-commit.test.mjs scripts/play-now.test.mjs scripts/join-room-ui.test.mjs scripts/game-setup-ui.test.mjs scripts/bot-rebuy.test.mjs
scripts.proof:live-settlement: npm run build:functions && npx firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-national-bourre-league "node scripts/live-emulator-settlement-trace.mjs single-bourre"
scripts.proof:live-settlement:multi: npm run build:functions && npx firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-national-bourre-league "node scripts/live-emulator-settlement-trace.mjs multi-bourre"
scripts.proof:live-handoff: npm run build:functions && npx firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-national-bourre-league "node scripts/live-emulator-handoff-trace.mjs"
scripts.proof:live-bankroll: npm run build:functions && npx firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-national-bourre-league "node scripts/live-emulator-bankroll-trace.mjs"
scripts.proof:runtime-robot-draw: npm run build:functions && npx firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-national-bourre-league "node scripts/runtime-robot-draw-authority-trace.mjs"
scripts.test:functions: npm run build:game && npm run build:money && npm run build:session-startup && node scripts/sync-functions-engine.mjs && npm ci --prefix functions --omit=dev && npm test --prefix functions
scripts.test: npm run test:game && npm run test:table && npm run test:session && npm run test:rules && npm run test:version && npm run test:functions
scripts.test:release: npm run test:qa && npm run build:functions && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:qa: npm run test && npm run check:social && npm run build:game && npm run build:money && npm run build:table && npm run build:settlement && npm run build:session-startup
